title: Data loss on COMMIT in WAL mode
key_bug_features: Data loss during COMMIT operation in WAL mode
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, age INTEGER CHECK(age >= 0), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO users (name, age) VALUES ('Bob', NULL);
UPDATE users SET age = age + 1 WHERE name = 'Alice';
SELECT * FROM users WHERE age IS NULL OR age < 18;
